Highly recommend to anyone looking for a fun and interactive experience!

i love this app! aside from the fact that if my characters name isn't in English, it would mix in Japanese, Chinese and even Thai once (the name was 성빈) or if i had responded in not english, the characters response would make it very obvious it doesn't understand said language, which is ironic, because i can see clearly the developer has made apps in Korean, which is the language i've been speaking in. 

I would appreciate it if the app supported more languages 🙏

target_reviews.text: Tell me why there’s just random words popping up in tons of paragraphs. Not even sentences just  words alone

target_reviews.title: My opinion!!
target_reviews.text: The app is super good!! They have a variety of bots to choose from and a category of what roleplay type you want. What I don't like is how the ads pop up every 5 minutes. If it were every 15+ minutes I'd think of putting the ratings at 5. But overall, good!

target_reviews.title: Great but recommendations/problems
target_reviews.text: This is the best app I have used for ai, ever! It seems immersive and it’s very good. But I have a few suggestions. I feel like it would be cool and more immersive/longer chats if there was an option for backgrounds on the chat, just to have an image behind to be able to focus on. And another, the bots replies shorten and get weaker over time, I’ll talk for barely fifteen minutes and it’s gone from essays to barely a paragraph. Otherwise, very, VERY, good.

target_reviews.title: This is better than character ai
target_reviews.text: Hear me out. They SEPERATE box characters from the actual characters- like, they’ll build up and add characters to the story. You have to see it yourself. This is the best role playing chat bot I’ve seen so far.

target_reviews.title: Good app and doesn’t charge money only occasional ads
target_reviews.text: The ads aren’t every minute, only every 5-7 minutes so it’s good

target_reviews.title: App problems
target_reviews.text: So overall this app is really good and I recommend it if you like to rp but there are two main problems one of them being whenever you make a bot it either deletes it after a minute or if you make more then one bot it deletes all of them and it gets frustrating because some people don’t have money to pay for the pass and another thing is how many ads there are between every message it’s like every ten messages you send there’s an ad honestly not the best!!

target_reviews.title: It’s a good game but the ads
target_reviews.text: It’s a really good game and I dont mind the ads but there is one in particular and I get it non stop basically the only ad I get it’s like trane or something and then it runs to a white screen and I cannot exit out so I then have to open and exit the game about 5 times before I can chat again for 8 minutes and then get the and  again and do it all over. Hope they fix that soon tbh or I will find another app

I know this isn’t gonna be seen, but I’ve used this app for around a week, and I can’t help but notice that it bombards people with ads. Those people who say very little ads are liars. You cannot go less than 3 minutes into chatting without getting slapped in the face with an ad. I know it is for revenue, but it gets annoying after the third ad.
Not only that, but the characters seem a bit too suggestive, especially for a AI chat app that has unlimited access to all ages.

target_reviews.title: One bug
target_reviews.text:
Great app. I love it. But recently there’s been a bug where the bot generates text and every few sentences there’ll be two words in the sentence that are together. For example, “he looked her in the eyeseven though he didn’t want to.” It seems like it does it in place of a comma or an em dash. This is the only problem I’m having so far, other than that, great app.

Edit: since it’s doing that, it seems to just not be using commas or em dashes at all. As well as forgetting other punctuation, like

target_reviews.title: “The ad of dread and doom.”
target_reviews.text: Okay, the app is great. Ads may get a bit irritating but thats not an issue. There is this one specific ad, about a company named Trane i think. 2026-06-25.title: Pretty good but costly.
2026-06-25.text: It’s a bit costly for long term stories, and the memory is a bit off. You have to remind the characters pretty consistently of events unless you absolutely only choose premade answers and don’t change any big plots. But if you’re on a budget and stick to the smallest subscription it’s decent for an occasional story progression. Too costly for constant gameplay unfortunately as the monthly gems provided for the lowest subscription flies by pretty quickly.
